professional_experience.title: Automation Developer (Business Analyst Grade)
highlights: Collaborated with Markets and Private Bank stakeholders to build governed data pipelines converting emails, CSVs, and API JSON into analysis-ready tables with validation checks, improving throughput by 50% and saving 85 hours/month
Modernized legacy automations into API-driven components through stakeholder requirements gathering, reducing turnaround time by 33%, enabling faster integration with downstream systems
Added validation checks and alerting to production workflows, reducing false alarms by 72% and improving data reliability
Supported controlled releases with post-deployment checks to ensure stable reporting and minimal downstream disruption
Led stakeholder walkthroughs and change management while maintaining runbooks, design docs, and release notes
Owned production support for scheduled workflows, coordinating fixes to meet defined SLAs

teaching_experience.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
highlights: Support 40 students through office hours, reinforcing ML concepts including supervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation
Help students debug Python ML code and troubleshoot issues with scikit-learn and PyTorch implementations
Grade assignments and projects on ML algorithms, feature engineering, and model performance analysis
Assist professor with course logistics and student communications

teaching_experience.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant
highlights: Designed modular programming assignments breaking complex problems into weekly objectives, enabling students to build complete solutions incrementally
Led office hours and mentoring sessions on Python fundamentals including control flow, functions, data structures, and object-oriented programming
Guided students in applying programming concepts to data analysis and visualization using matplotlib, NumPy, and statistics libraries
Graded assignments and provided feedback on code logic and problem-solving, emphasizing independent thinking and academic integrity
